channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Carboplatin Injection (60505-6282-1)
item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 50 mg/5 mL (10 mg/mL) Multiple Dose Vial (NDC 60505-6282-1) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-22 Company: Teyro Labs Wholesaler & Distributor through Marketing partner (Apotex Inc.); Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: Current: Carboplatin Injection (60505-6282-3)
item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 150 mg/15 mL (10 mg/mL) Multiple Dose Vial (NDC 60505-6282-3) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-22 Company: Teyro Labs Wholesaler & Distributor through Marketing partner (Apotex Inc.); Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 450 mg/45 mL (10 mg/mL) Multiple Dose Vial (NDC 60505-6282-6) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-22 Company: Teyro Labs Wholesaler & Distributor through Marketing partner (Apotex Inc.); Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: Current: Carboplatin Injection (60505-6282-7)
item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 600 mg/60 mL (10 mg/mL) Multiple Dose Vial (NDC 60505-6282-7) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-22 Company: Teyro Labs Wholesaler & Distributor through Marketing partner (Apotex Inc.); Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: Current: Rifampin Injection (0068-0597-01)
item.description: Rifadin, Injection, 600 mg/10 mL (NDC 0068-0597-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-22 Company: Sanofi-Aventis U.S. LLC Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: Current: Technetium TC-99M Pyrophosphate Kit Injection (69945-094-20)
item.description: Technescan PYP, Injection, 11.9 mg/10 mL; 3.2 mg/10 mL (NDC 69945-094-20) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-18 Company: Curium US LLC Availability via allocation expected mid-July 2026
